question_text: Let 𝑋1, 𝑋2, … , 𝑋5 be random observations from a continuous distribution. Let 𝜃𝑝 be 𝑝-th population quantile. Consider the following hypotheses 𝐻0: 𝜃1 = 2.5 against 𝐻1: 𝜃1 > 2.5. Let 𝑋(𝑟) denote the 𝑟-th order statistic of the given observations. Then which of the following is a critical region of a level 0.05 test?
